---
title: "Syllabus"
toc: true
---

> **Public version.** This page is the sanitized, public-facing summary
> of the syllabus. The full course syllabus — with section numbers, dates,
> rosters, and institution-specific policies — lives in the LMS.

## Course goals

Placeholder. Add 3–5 student-facing learning outcomes here.

## Topics

Placeholder. Add a short list of major topic areas.

## Structure

Placeholder. Describe lecture/lab/activity rhythm, assessments, and how
the public materials on this site relate to in-class work.

## Tools

Placeholder. R, RStudio, and small datasets hosted in `data/`.

## Policies (public summary)

Placeholder. Summarize what students should know about late work,
collaboration, and AI tool use **without** copying institutional policy
text verbatim.
